ab: Tuhuy ku bubu mu musa rmigaw.
en: I went out with my mother today.

ab: Mgkarac bi ka karac baraw, ini kskuy ni ini ktalux uri, ltu ka bgihur.
ch: 白天的天空很藍，天氣不冷也不熱，風很涼爽。
en: The sky is blue during the day, the weather is neither cold nor hot, and the wind is cool.

ab: Tluung nami babaw sspriq mkan meyn-paw, smbu qbubur ka rdax hidaw, muxul balay.
ch: 我們在草地上吃著麵包，陽光灑在身上，非常溫暖。
en: We ate bread on the grass, the sun was shining on us, and it was very warm.

ab: Babaw ska hidaw do, maa embanah ka karac da.
en: In the afternoon, the sky turned red.

ab: Smiling ku bubu mu, ma embanah ka karac baraw hug?
ch: 我問媽媽，為甚麼天空是紅色的?
en: I asked my mother why the sky is red.

ab: Yabi meiyah ka bgihur paru da, msa ka bubu.
ch: 媽媽說，可能是颱風要來了。
en: Mom said, maybe the typhoon is coming.

ab: Keeman ungac rulung ka karac baraw, smriyu ka ppngrah da.
ch: 晚上天上沒有雲，星星出來了。
en: There were no clouds in the sky at night, and the stars came out.

ab: Mniq ku kska elug seusa sapah, smulu ku ppngrah.
ch: 在回家的路上，我跟星星許願。
en: On the way home, I made a wish with the stars,

ab: Tay saw uxay meiyah ka bgihur paru, mkmusa ku bi rmigaw nganguc na.
ch: 希望颱風不要來，我還想再出去玩。
en: I hope the typhoon doesn't come, I still want to go out to play again.
